summary: The safe upper limit dosage recommended across multiple reliable sources and expert consensus stands at approximately 5mg per kg body weight ensuring effective administration while minimizing risk factors such as toxicity or adverse reactions especially critical when treating pediatric patients where precise titration becomes paramount due their smaller size compared adults making them more susceptible side effects even within therapeutic range boundaries if not carefully managed accordingly during procedure execution phase itself. To ensure safety always adhere strictly no exceeding prescribed limits regardless individual case variations unless explicitly advised otherwise based upon specific medical condition considerations
